summary: Frontend testing completed for attendance check-in/check-out feature. All new UI enhancements verified: Admin Mark tab now shows 'Checked In' and 'Checked Out' summary cards plus 'Today's Attendance Log' table with Check-in Time and Check-out Time columns. Attendance Sheet tab also shows both times correctly.
passed_tests: UI: Admin Mark tab displays 'Checked In' count card (emerald color)
UI: Admin Mark tab displays 'Checked Out' count card (indigo color)
UI: Admin Mark tab shows 'Today's Attendance Log (Check-in & Check-out Records)' table
UI: Attendance Log table has 'Check-in Time' column with green background header
UI: Attendance Log table has 'Check-out Time' column with red background header
UI: Attendance Log table shows Total Hours, Status, Late/On Time columns
UI: Attendance Sheet tab shows 'Check-in' column
UI: Attendance Sheet tab shows 'Check-out' column
UI: Summary cards show counts for Present, Absent, Checked In, Checked Out, Late, Late Hours, Unmarked
UI: Employee attendance data displays correctly with check-in/out times (e.g., Rahul Sharma: 09:30 / 18:00)
UI: All 4 tabs functional (Self Check-in, Admin Mark, Attendance Sheet, Salary Calculator)
UI: Winter Timing banner displays correctly with shift 09:30-18:00
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Both check-in and check-out times are prominently displayed in Admin Mark tab table
Good: Summary cards include 'Checked In' (line 524-530) and 'Checked Out' (line 531-537) counts
Good: Check-in/Check-out columns have distinct color-coded headers (green/red) for clarity
Good: Late/On Time status indicator shows for each employee
Good: data-testid attributes present for tabs (tab-checkin, tab-admin, tab-sheet, tab-salary)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing attendance data for Rahul Sharma was used for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance check-in/check-out feature fully verified. Admin Mark tab shows 7 summary cards including 'Checked In' (count 1) and 'Checked Out' (count 1). Today's Attendance Log table displays Employee, Department, Check-in Time, Check-out Time, Total Hours, Status, Late/On Time columns. Sample data: Rahul Sharma (Sales) checked in at 09:30, checked out at 18:00, late by 0.5h. Attendance Sheet tab also shows Check-in and Check-out columns correctly.
